claim: Use Claude's Frontend Design plugin to avoid generic AI aesthetics; it includes specialized instructions to improve UI/UX of AI-generated designs
actionable: Install the Frontend Design plugin from Claude Code marketplace when generating UI; it prevents generic, cookie-cutter designs.
source_title: The Claude Code Skill Boris Cherny Runs on Every Project

claim: Claude's /batch command parallelizes work using separate worktrees; each sub-agent works in isolation, then the main agent merges results
actionable: For large refactors or migrations, use /batch to spawn parallel agents in isolated worktrees; prevents interference and enables efficient large-scale changes.
source_title: The Claude Code Skill Boris Cherny Runs on Every Project

claim: The /verify skill (internal Anthropic tool) tests code changes automatically by running the app and checking multiple angles; build your own for your project
actionable: Create a verify skill tailored to your project that runs tests, linters, and visual checks to validate AI-generated changes.
source_title: The Claude Code Skill Boris Cherny Runs on Every Project

claim: Skillify (internal Anthropic) captures a session and converts it to a reusable skill; you can build your own by recording workflow steps
actionable: Document multi-step workflows that you repeat; use Skillify-like tools to capture and automate them into reusable skills.
source_title: The Claude Code Skill Boris Cherny Runs on Every Project

claim: Use /security-scan in Claude Code to find vulnerabilities (input validation, auth, injection, secrets); run it on large codebases to catch issues AI-generated code might miss
actionable: After AI generates code, run security scan to catch common vulnerabilities before production; it evaluates against multiple standards.
source_title: The Claude Code Skill Boris Cherny Runs on Every Project
